creator: hdeleeuw@picardi.nl
text:
Same problem here, after updating to FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE-p11 today.
I tried the "cd /usr/ports/devel/libpciaccess; svnlite update -r438045; make clean; make deinstall; make reinstall" suggested by George, but I get 

Skipped '.'
svn: E155007: None of the targets are working copies

(used svnlite as svn is not installed on my machine)

I'll try to find another way to downgrade libpciaccess to 0.13.5, but at this moment I don't know how to yet.
